---
title: "James Borders"
pagetitle: "James Borders"
first-name: "James"
last-name: "Borders"
credentials: "PhD, CCC-SLP"
position: "Assistant Professor"
affiliation: "Boston University"
pronouns: "he/him"
orcid: "0000-0002-0291-4266"
date-joined: "2021-02-01"
order: 8
categories:
  - "Collaborator"
description-research: "James Borders, PhD, CCC-SLP is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Speech, Language, & Hearing Sciences at Boston University. His research focuses on impairments in airway portection (swallowing, coughing, breathing) and its impact on health and quality of life across aging and disease."
description-os: "James is passionate about meta-science, statistics, and how these practices affect the transparency, rigor, and replicability of science."
link: "https://sites.bu.edu/borderslab/"
website-button: "Visit the Airway Protection Research Lab!"
headshot: "../_headshots/james_borders.png"
lightbox: false
draft: false
layout: article
title-block-categories: false
editor: source
---

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![{{< meta title >}}, {{< meta credentials >}}<br>{{< meta position >}}<br>{{< meta affiliation >}}](../_headshots/james_borders.png)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
{{< meta description-research >}}

{{< meta description-os >}}

[{{< meta website-button>}}]({{< meta link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}\
\
:::
::::::
